title: RedactionMetadata
description: Metadata describing what was redacted from the bundle.

redacted.description: Whether any redaction has been applied to this bundle.

redacted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when redaction was performed.

redacted_fields.description: List of field paths that were redacted.

redaction_policy.description: Name or identifier of the redaction policy applied.

replacement.description: The placeholder value used to replace redacted content.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about the redaction.
